campaigns.name: AI Navigator
campaigns.objective: Position Fresh Run Demo as the trusted AI implementation partner for medium businesses, driving 20% MoM demo requests from qualified prospects.
campaigns.targetAudience: CTOs, Operations VPs, and IT Managers at medium-sized businesses (50-500 employees) struggling with AI adoption, uncertain about ROI, and overwhelmed by vendor noise
campaigns.positioning: The practical AI implementation partner that bridges the gap between AI potential and business reality — no jargon, no fluff, just measurable results
keyMessages: AI is accessible for medium businesses — you don't need enterprise resources to start
We've already solved your hardest AI challenges so you can focus on execution
Measurable ROI from day one, not theoretical benefits or long-term promises
Your team becomes AI-fluent without the steep learning curve or cultural friction
contentThemes: AI implementation roadmaps — breaking down complex AI projects into actionable steps for medium businesses
ROI case studies and benchmarks — showing real numbers from businesses like yours
Myth-busting content — addressing common fears and misconceptions about AI adoption
Team enablement stories — how other companies trained teams without disrupting workflows
Vendor landscape analysis — helping prospects cut through the noise and understand what matters
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture through thought leadership and educational content
Phase 2: Consideration — nurture and educate with case studies, ROI calculators, and implementation frameworks
Phase 3: Conversion — demo requests and SQL handoff through personalized consultation offers
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture

campaigns.name: ROI Visibility
campaigns.objective: Build credibility through transparent ROI demonstrations, positioning Fresh Run Demo as the vendor that proves value before the sale.
campaigns.targetAudience: Finance leaders, Operations VPs, and C-suites skeptical about AI vendor ROI, requiring hard data and business case validation
campaigns.positioning: The ROI-transparent partner that shows, not tells — we prove value through measurable outcomes and transparent metrics
keyMessages: We don't promise — we measure and report actual outcomes
Transparent ROI tracking built into every engagement
Peer benchmarks and industry standards that set realistic expectations
Business case development that aligns AI investment with strategic goals
contentThemes: ROI frameworks and calculators — helping prospects model their expected returns
Transparent case studies with actual metrics, not just success stories
Industry benchmarks and peer comparisons — what others are achieving
Business case templates — ready-to-use frameworks for AI investment approval
Cost avoidance narratives — showing how AI prevents problems, not just creates value
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — publish ROI frameworks and benchmarks that attract skeptical buyers
Phase 2: Consideration — provide interactive ROI modeling and peer comparisons
Phase 3: Conversion — offer pre-sale ROI validation sessions and business case development
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — publish ROI frameworks and benchmarks

landingPages.headline: AI Implementation for Medium Businesses
landingPages.subheadline: Skip the jargon and get measurable results — we've already solved your hardest challenges
landingPages.valueProposition: Fresh Run Demo bridges the gap between AI potential and business reality, delivering measurable ROI from day one without the enterprise overhead

landingPages.headline: Calculate Your AI ROI Potential
landingPages.subheadline: See what other medium-sized businesses are achieving — with transparent metrics and real results
landingPages.valueProposition: Our interactive ROI calculator shows realistic expectations based on industry benchmarks, plus a free business case template

landingPages.headline: Real Results from Real Businesses
landingPages.subheadline: Transparent case studies with actual metrics, not just success stories
landingPages.valueProposition: See exactly what we delivered, how we measured it, and the actual ROI — no fluff, just outcomes

salesQualifiedHandoff.handoffProcess: Automated Slack notification to Sales team with full lead profile, scoring breakdown, and recommended next steps. Sales rep receives 24-hour window to respond with discovery call invitation.
